title: Go behind the scenes on all things automation!
excerpt: This Thursday, join product manager Amichay Even Chen and go behind the scenes of monday.com automations. Mark your calendars, you don’t want to miss this upcoming community event!   Register here.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: This Thursday, join product manager Amichay Even Chen and go behind the scenes of monday.com automations. Mark your calendars, you don’t want to miss this upcoming community event! Register here.

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a replay of this? I wanted to but couldn’t attend.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! There is no recording of our live events but we are having the same event next week for those that missed the previous one… Check it out! Meeting Registration - Zoom
